name: chr8p11_pericentric_alpha_HSat
description: Chromosome 8 p-arm pericentric flank (8p11.1-8p11.21), the immediate sub-centromeric LCR shoreline on the p-side of the chr8 centromere. Alpha-satellite (D8Z2), pericentromeric SDs, HSat patches. Site of the 8p11 myeloproliferative-disorder breakpoints (FGFR1). Resolved in T2T-CHM13.

architecture.internal_structure: alpha-sat HOR + HSat patches + pericentromeric SD shoreline; distally adjoins FGFR1 / 8p11 myeloproliferative-syndrome region.
